name: @intentsolutionsio/agent-context-manager
description: Automatically detects and loads AGENTS.md files to provide agent-specific instructions alongside CLAUDE.md. Enables specialized agent behaviors without manual intervention.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install agent-context-manager\\n  or /plugin install agent-context-manager@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
